paragraphs.text: WHOSE VOICE IS THE LOUDEST AND THEIR INFLUENCING FACTOR
ARE THE RESURRECTION GOING TO ACCOMPLISH OUR PURPOSE THROUGH THE RESURRECTION?

WOULD THEY GIVE US UP TO HALF OF THEIR INHERITANCE FOR THE TRANSFER OF WEALTH FROM THE WICKED/WEALTHY TO US IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL FOR OUR LAST DAY MINISTRY IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL TO BE ACCOMPLISHED?

LET IT BE KNOWN: THE WEIGHING FACTORS are crucial in determining whether a resurrection will be granted. WHOSE VOICE IS THE LOUDEST? WE weigh the influence and sincerity of those pleading for resurrection. ONLY THOSE WITH GENUINE INTENT, whose voices align with OUR DIVINE PURPOSE, will carry weight in OUR DECISION.
UNDERSTAND THIS: THE RESURRECTION MUST SERVE OUR PURPOSE. If the

resurrection does not contribute to advancing OUR AGENDA through CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, it is in vain. WE DO NOT RESURRECT for the sake of comforting the grieving but to ACCOMPLISH OUR ETERNAL PURPOSE.
CONSIDER THIS: WOULD THEY GIVE UP TO HALF OF THEIR INHERITANCE to

demonstrate their commitment to OUR CAUSE? The willingness to sacrifice for OUR WORK is a key factor in OUR DECISION to resurrect. THIS IS NOT ABOUT MATERIAL WEALTH but about the transfer of resources - both spiritual and material - to advance OUR LAST DAY MINISTRY in CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. KNOW THIS: EVERY RESURRECTION IS A WEIGHING OF HEARTS AND INTENTIONS.

WE are not swayed by emotions but by the truth of whether the resurrection aligns with OUR FINAL MISSION. LET THIS BE A SOBERING REMINDER: THE WEIGHING FACTORS are not to be taken lightly, for they determine the eternal consequences of those who seek to return.
